channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Why Tunisia’s renewable energy strategy is facing resistance
item.description: Giving concessions for renewable projects to foreign corporations will not help solve the country’s energy crisis.

item.title: An Israeli court has convicted seven men over the 2021 lynching of Sa’id Mo
item.description: An Israeli court has convicted seven men over the 2021 lynching of Sa’id Moussa, ending a five-year trial.

item.title: Slave trade reenacted on Juneteenth as leaders demand reparations
item.description: Ghana has been hosting a conference to advance the UN resolution declaring slavery the ‘gravest crime against humanity.'

item.title: MSF says conditions in Lebanon’s Nabatieh resemble a ‘death trap’
item.description: Israel has stepped up attacks on parts of southern Lebanon, including Nabatieh, since midnight on Friday.

item.title: German journalist held in Syria back home, family says
item.description: Eva Maria Michelmann's brother says she had been held in the Syrian city of Raqqa since January.

item.title: India’s revolution in women’s cricket
item.description: In cricket-obsessed India, a women’s World Cup win and a glitzy new league are transforming the lives of female players.

item.title: What the US-Iran peace deal means for the ‘Team Melli’ World Cup campaign
item.description: Experts hope the 'extra animosity' towards Team Melli will subside as the agreement comes into being.

item.title: Morocco fans dream of World Cup glory after Scotland win
item.description: This is what Morocco’s fans are saying after winning their first match at the 2026 World Cup.

item.title: Families storm Ebola treatment centre in DRC, remove patients
item.description: Families of suspected Ebola patients in DR Congo stormed a quarantine centre, removing patients.

item.title: Trump’s Iran deal, Israel’s meltdown
item.description: The precarious memorandum of understanding between the US and Iran.

item.title: Which teams have qualified for the World Cup 2026 knockouts, round of 32?
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup knockout stage format, criteria and rules for qualification. Find out who's in and who's out.

item.title: Two roadside bombs kill at least seven in northwestern Pakistan
item.description: No group has yet claimed responsibility for the attacks.

item.title: Parents and two daughters killed in Israeli strike in Gaza
item.description: Israel has repeatedly violated the October ceasefire brokered by the US.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Netherlands vs Sweden prediction, schedules, key highlights
item.description: World Cup day 10 features Netherlands-Sweden as the USA reach the knockout stage and Brazil move closer to qualification

item.title: Mona Khalil, Lebanon’s turtle advocate, dies after Israeli attack
item.description: Khalil spent more than two decades protecting the nests of endangered turtle species in southern Lebanon.

item.title: Australia pledges action on H5N1 after bird flu case confirmed
item.description: Australia confirmed its first mainland H5N1 bird flu case in a seabird near Esperance, WA.

item.title: Israeli strikes kill 22 in Lebanon, putting US-Iran peace talks in peril
item.description: US media are reporting that Witkoff and Kushner are preparing for negotiations with Iran after talks were postponed.

item.title: ‘We tasted the horrors of war’: Stories of refugees who returned home
item.description: In 2025, nearly 15 million displaced people returned - the largest surge of returns recorded by the UN.

item.title: Iran war day 113: Tehran presses US over Lebanon ceasefire
item.description: Iran presses US over Lebanon as Israeli strikes test fragile ceasefire and broader peace efforts.

item.title: What pushed the number of displaced people down?
item.description: Global displacement fell for the first time in a decade. On World Refugee Day, AJLabs looks at what drove millions home.

item.title: Turkiye knocked out of World Cup 2026 after 1-0 defeat to 10-man Paraguay
item.description: Turkiye suffered their second successive defeat in North America, bringing an end to their World Cup campaign.

item.title: Inferno rips through Dominican Republic beach resort
item.description: Inferno rips through Dominican Republic beach resort

item.title: Israel fetes Somaliland’s leader as it seeks to expand Red Sea influence
item.description: Six months after recognition, Israel and Somaliland say they are moving from symbolism to strategic cooperation.

item.title: UN meeting erupts over sexual violence allegations against Israel
item.description: “You will be quiet.” A UN meeting descended into a heated exchange.

item.title: Mexico City looks to rein in street drinking after massive World Cup party
item.description: Authorities collected some 40 tonnes of waste around Reforma Avenue, the historic centre, on Friday morning.
